title: Customize Users Profile

posts.author: assafeitan (Assaf Eitan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all
Hi would like to add a customization that would say if my users in the project on monday are working “part-time” or the %work they are working .
Also maybe if I can add how many % of work I assigned to each user- I"ll explain -
Lets say I would like to assign 30% of the worker’s work on task 1 and 20% on task 2 and 50% on task 3.
Is there a way to do it on monday?

Thanks In advanced!

Assaf EItan

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @assafeitan!

Have you tried the Workload feature for assigning different work capacities? If not, I highly recommend it!

You can find more info here: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360010699760-The-Workload-View-and-Widget

If you have any questions about this, let us know at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to help!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
